task: Anti-fabrication verify BAI1 and BAI2 draft papers

minor_discrepancies.description: Tom-tat files use comma (,) as decimal separator (European format) while citations may use period (.)
minor_discrepancies.action: Not a factual error - just formatting convention difference

minor_discrepancies.issue: Some specific numerical claims not explicitly in Tom-tat abstracts
minor_discrepancies.description: While papers are correctly referenced, specific numbers may require checking original papers
minor_discrepancies.action: Not a fabrication risk - just incompleteness of abstracts

detailed_findings.notes: No fabricated author names detected. All Vietnamese papers (VN001-VN030) exist. All international papers (QT001-QT073) exist in collection.
